executives.name: Gary Nagle
executives.background: Gary Nagle joined Glencore in 2000 and was appointed CEO in July 2021. He has held various senior roles across the group, including Global Head of Ferroalloys and CEO of Glencore Agriculture. He holds commerce and accounting degrees from the University of the Witwatersrand and is a Chartered Accountant (South Africa).

executives.name: Steven Kalmin
executives.background: Steven Kalmin joined Glencore in 1999 and was appointed CFO in 2005. He oversaw the company's IPO in 2011. He holds a Bachelor of Commerce from the University of New South Wales and is a member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants (Australia).

board_of_directors.name: Kalidas Madhavpeddi
board_of_directors.background: Kalidas Madhavpeddi was appointed Chairman in July 2021. He has over 40 years of experience in the international mining industry, including as CEO of China Molybdenum International. He holds degrees from the Indian Institute of Technology and the University of Iowa.

board_of_directors.name: Gary Nagle
board_of_directors.background: Chief Executive Officer of Glencore plc.

board_of_directors.name: Martin Gilbert
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder of Aberdeen Asset Management. He is Chairman of Revolut and AssetCo plc.

board_of_directors.name: Cynthia Carroll
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Anglo American plc and former President and CEO of Alcan Primary Metals.
committees: Health, Safety, Environment and Communities Committee (Chair)

board_of_directors.name: Gill Marcus
board_of_directors.background: Former Governor of the South African Reserve Bank and former Non-Executive Director of Gold Fields Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: David Miller
board_of_directors.background: Portfolio Manager at Elliott Investment Management L.P. with extensive experience in the mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Liz Hewitt
board_of_directors.background: Former Group Director of Corporate Affairs at Smith & Nephew plc and former Non-Executive Director of Melrose Industries plc.
